prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is H-202 Terminations & balancing within 2.3 HVAC-R. The relevant subcategory is 2.3.2 Distribution. The observed field condition is: damper positions vs. balance report mismatch. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors SMACNA, TAB reports. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T2 H-202 Measurement & estimation
